meta.title: Vityilló Guest House – Szomód
meta.description: Luxury guest house in the heart of the Gerecse hills, Szomód. Private forest, sauna, pool.

hero.title: Vityilló Guest House
hero.subtitle: Private forest, sauna, pool — where luxury meets the wilderness

about.label: Our Story
about.title: Where the forest meets comfort
about.p1: Vityilló Guest House nestles in the picturesque village of Szomód, at the foot of the Gerecse hills — where the silence of nature and modern luxury coexist in perfect harmony. Surrounded by a private forest, serene clearings and fresh air embrace this extraordinary retreat.
about.p2: Whether you seek a romantic escape for two or an exceptional hideaway for a small group, Vityilló offers a unique experience: private sauna, outdoor pool, kettle grill and panoramic views across the Gerecse hills.

amenities.label: Amenities
amenities.title: Everything you need
amenities.subtitle: Thoughtfully crafted for the perfect retreat

ac.name: Air Conditioning
ac.desc: Modern split AC in every room

rooms.label: Our Rooms
rooms.title: Choose Your Room
rooms.subtitle: Comfort and elegance on every level
rooms.heroSubtitle: Two thoughtfully furnished floors for up to 10 guests in total — with direct forest views.
rooms.priceNote: Indicative price for two guests, per night.

room1.name: Upper Floor
room1.desc: Spacious master bedroom with a double bed, elegant living area and full bathroom with shower cabin. Direct forest panorama views.
room1.long: The upper floor is Vityilló's most spacious unit: a comfortable double bed, a separate living corner and a full bathroom with a generous shower cabin. Large windows open directly onto the surrounding forest, so every morning greets you with green canopies and birdsong.

room2.name: Lower Floor
room2.desc: Three-bed room with its own bathroom and shower cabin. Garden access directly from the room.
room2.long: The lower floor is ideal for friends or families: three comfortable single beds, a private bathroom and direct garden access. Through the garden door, the sauna, pool and bonfire terrace are just a few steps away.

experiences.label: Experiences
experiences.title: Experiences at Vityilló
experiences.subtitle: The art of relaxation — for every sense
experiences.heroSubtitle: Private sauna, outdoor pool, bonfire evenings and untouched forest — every form of recharging in one place.
experiences.intro: Vityilló is not just accommodation, but an experience. Discover the details that turn an ordinary break into an unforgettable one.

sauna.name: Private Finnish Sauna
sauna.desc: A Finnish sauna reserved exclusively for you.
sauna.long: At the end of the day, there is nothing better than the warmth of your own private Finnish sauna. The scent of wood, the hot stones and complete silence offer perfect regeneration — no crowds, no queues, anytime.

pool.name: Outdoor Pool & Jacuzzi
pool.desc: An outdoor pool with a built-in jacuzzi.
pool.long: Immerse yourself in the outdoor pool while gazing at the forest canopy. The built-in jacuzzi function pampers you with bubbling water, even under a starlit sky.

grill.name: Bonfire Evenings
grill.desc: Traditional kettle grill and fire pit on the terrace.
grill.long: The heart of Hungarian hospitality is the bogrács kettle. Gather around the outdoor fire pit and grill to prepare your favourite stew or goulash as the evening slowly settles over the forest.

forest.name: Private Forest & Trails
forest.desc: Your own forest and the Gerecse trails on your doorstep.
forest.long: A private forest and the marked hiking trails of the Gerecse hills await in the immediate surroundings of the house. Walk, cycle or simply breathe — nature is right at hand here.

gallery.label: Gallery
gallery.title: Explore Vityilló
gallery.subtitle: Where nature and luxury meet
gallery.heroSubtitle: Snapshots of the house, the rooms and the untouched forest surroundings.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Information on the processing of personal data under EU Regulation 2016/679 (GDPR).

sections.heading: 1. Data controller
sections.body: Vityilló Kft. (2896 Szomód, Fő utca 1.). Contact: info@vityillo.hu, +36 30 123 4567.

sections.heading: 2. Scope of data processed
sections.body: Data provided in the booking and contact forms: name, email address, phone number, arrival and departure dates, number of guests, and the guest data required by law (citizenship, address, year of birth, document data).

sections.heading: 3. Purpose and legal basis
sections.body: Fulfilling the booking and keeping in contact (performance of a contract), and meeting the legal obligations applicable to accommodation services, including NTAK reporting and the VIZA system (legal obligation).

sections.heading: 4. Data retention
sections.body: Accounting documents are kept for 8 years as required by law; booking data is retained until the purpose ceases.

sections.heading: 5. Data transfers
sections.body: Your data is transferred only on the basis of a legal obligation (e.g. NTAK, authorities). It is not shared with third parties for marketing purposes.

sections.heading: 6. Your rights
sections.body: You may request access to, rectification or erasure of your data, and restriction of processing. You may lodge a complaint with the Hungarian NAIH (naih.hu).

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Terms governing the use of Vityilló Guest House services.

sections.heading: 1. Subject of the contract
sections.body: Vityilló Guest House (Operator: Vityilló Kft.) provides accommodation services under these terms.

sections.heading: 2. Booking and confirmation
sections.body: A booking starts with the submission of the form and becomes final upon the Operator's written confirmation. The prices shown are indicative; the final price is stated in the confirmation.

sections.heading: 3. Payment terms
sections.body: A deposit may be required to finalise the booking. The remaining amount is payable on site upon arrival. The tourist tax is payable on site.

sections.heading: 4. Cancellation
sections.body: For cancellations made 14 days before arrival, the deposit is fully refundable. For cancellations within 14 days, the deposit is non-refundable.

sections.heading: 5. House rules
sections.body: Check-in from 3:00 PM, check-out until 10:00 AM. Smoking is prohibited inside the house. The pool and sauna are used at the guests' own risk.

sections.heading: 6. Liability
sections.body: The Operator accepts no liability for guests' valuables or for damage resulting from improper use of the services.
